idioms: to the best of one’s knowledge

synonyms: to the best of one’s belief
means.example-sentence: To the best of my knowledge, he’s been working for his mother’s company for years.
means.sentence-jp: 私の知る限り、彼は何年も母親の会社に勤めている。

notes: to the best of one's recollection [ability] は「(人)の記憶する[能力の及ぶ]限り(では)」。
